title: Santarém Heat Wave
lead: Santarém is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Santarém has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a highly unusual event. 
 The CDD value of 9.8 GG and humidity of 83% are contributing to the extreme conditions. 
 The wind speed of 5.3 km/h is not providing significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the city.
